input: Create a portfolio gallery module. It should display project cards in a responsive grid with thumbnail image, title, description, tech tags, and links. Support filtering by tech tag and searching by title. Include a detail view showing full project description, multiple images in a lightbox carousel, and links to live demo and source code. Support sorting by date added or alphabetically.
hint: Grid layout via CSS Grid with auto-fill and minmax. Lightbox is a modal overlay with prev/next navigation. Tech tags rendered as pills with click-to-filter. Detail view triggered by card click. Image carousel tracks current index with wrap-around. MSS: contentType art, structure collection, boundary all (a portfolio is a public showcase — users share it with employers/clients, not private data), scale 2.

**Key features:**

- **Gallery view** — responsive CSS grid of project cards with thumbnail, title, description, tech tags, and link indicators
- **Filter by tag** — clickable tag pills in a bar above the grid; active tag is highlighted
- **Search by title** — text input filters projects in real-time
- **Sort** — dropdown with 4 options: newest/oldest first, A-Z, Z-A
- **Detail view** — full project page with extended description, image carousel with prev/next navigation and thumbnail strip, lightbox overlay, and buttons linking to live demo and source code
- **JSON API** — full CRUD at `/api/projects` and `/api/tags` for programmatic access
- **Persistent storage** — reads/writes `data/projects.json` using Bun.file/Bun.write

---
name: portfolio-gallery
description: Responsive project portfolio gallery with filtering, search, sorting, and lightbox detail view
metadata:
  contentType: art
  structure: collection
  boundary: none
  scale: "2"
---

# Portfolio Gallery

A personal portfolio gallery module for showcasing projects as cards in a responsive grid layout.

## Features

- **Grid View**: Responsive card grid showing thumbnail, title, description, tech tags, and links
- **Filter by Tag**: Click any tech tag to filter the gallery to matching projects
- **Search**: Full-text search by project title
- **Sort**: Sort projects by date added (newest/oldest) or alphabetically (A-Z/Z-A)
- **Detail View**: Expanded view for a single project with full description, image carousel/lightbox, and links to live demo and source code

## Data

Projects are stored in `data/projects.json`. Each project has:

- `id` — unique identifier
- `title` — project name
- `description` — short summary shown on cards
- `fullDescription` — extended description shown in detail view
- `thumbnail` — primary image URL
- `images` — array of image URLs for the lightbox carousel
- `tags` — array of technology/skill tags
- `demoUrl` — link to live demo (optional)
- `sourceUrl` — link to source code (optional)
- `dateAdded` — ISO date string

## Usage

```ts
import { listProjects, getProject, addProject } from "./index";

// List with optional filters
const projects = await listProjects({ tag: "TypeScript", search: "chat", sort: "date-desc" });

// Get single project detail
const project = await getProject("project-id");

// Add a new project
await addProject({ title: "My App", description: "..." });
```

## Rendering

```ts
import { renderGallery, renderDetail } from "./render";

const galleryHtml = renderGallery(projects, { activeTag: "React", search: "", sort: "date-desc" });
const detailHtml = renderDetail(project);
```

input.content:
---
name: portfolio-gallery
description: Responsive portfolio gallery with project cards, filtering, search, sorting, and lightbox detail views
metadata:
  contentType: art
  structure: collection
  boundary: none
  scale: "2"
---

# Portfolio Gallery

A personal portfolio gallery module for showcasing projects in a responsive grid layout.

## Features

- **Grid View**: Responsive card grid showing thumbnail, title, description, tech tags, and links
- **Filtering**: Filter projects by technology tag (e.g. TypeScript, React, Python)
- **Search**: Full-text search across project titles
- **Sorting**: Sort projects by date added (newest/oldest) or alphabetically (A-Z/Z-A)
- **Detail View**: Expanded project view with full description, image lightbox carousel, and external links
- **Lightbox Carousel**: Navigate through multiple project images with prev/next controls

## Data Model

Each project contains:
- `id` — unique identifier
- `title` — project name
- `description` — short summary for the card
- `fullDescription` — detailed description for the detail view
- `thumbnail` — primary image URL
- `images` — array of image URLs for the lightbox carousel
- `tags` — array of technology/skill tags
- `demoUrl` — link to live demo (optional)
- `sourceUrl` — link to source code (optional)
- `dateAdded` — ISO date string for sorting

## Usage

1. Add projects to `data/projects.json`
2. Use the grid view to browse projects
3. Click a tag to filter by that technology
4. Use the search bar to find projects by title
5. Click a project card to open the detail view with lightbox

export type Project = {
  id: string
  title: string
  description: string
  fullDescription: string
  thumbnail: string
  images: string[]
  tags: string[]
  demoUrl?: string
  sourceUrl?: string
  dateAdded: string
}

export type SortField = 'dateAdded' | 'title'
export type SortDirection = 'asc' | 'desc'

export type GalleryFilters = {
  search: string
  tag: string
  sortField: SortField
  sortDirection: SortDirection
}

export type GalleryState = {
  projects: Project[]
  filters: GalleryFilters
  selectedProjectId: string | null
  lightboxIndex: number
}

input.content:
---
name: portfolio-gallery
description: Display and manage a portfolio of projects with filtering, search, sorting, and detail views
metadata:
  contentType: art
  structure: collection
  boundary: none
  scale: "2"
---

# Portfolio Gallery

A responsive portfolio gallery for showcasing projects. Each project card displays a thumbnail, title, description, tech tags, and links.

## Features

- **Grid View**: Responsive card grid with thumbnails, titles, descriptions, tech tags, and links
- **Filter by Tag**: Click any tech tag to filter the gallery to matching projects
- **Search**: Search projects by title with real-time results
- **Sort**: Sort projects by date added (newest/oldest) or alphabetically (A-Z/Z-A)
- **Detail View**: Expand a project to see full description, image carousel with lightbox, and links to live demo and source code

## Data Model

Each project has:
- `id` — unique identifier
- `title` — project name
- `description` — short summary for card view
- `fullDescription` — detailed write-up for detail view
- `thumbnail` — primary image URL
- `images` — array of image URLs for the carousel
- `tags` — array of technology/skill tags
- `demoUrl` — link to live demo (optional)
- `sourceUrl` — link to source code (optional)
- `dateAdded` — ISO date string

## Usage

- Browse the grid to explore projects
- Use the search bar to find projects by title
- Click a tech tag to filter by that technology
- Use the sort dropdown to reorder projects
- Click a project card to open the detail view with full description and image carousel

Features include real-time data from multiple weather APIs, interactive radar maps, hourly and 7-day forecasts, severe weather alerts, and historical trend charts. import { h, Fragment } from "plaited"
import type { Project, SortOption, GalleryState } from "./types"
import { styles } from "./styles"

const styleToString = (style: Record<string, string>): string =>
  Object.entries(style)
    .map(([key, value]) => {
      const cssKey = key.replace(/([A-Z])/g, "-$1").toLowerCase()
      return `${cssKey}: ${value}`
    })
    .join("; ")

const renderTag = (tag: string, activeTag: string | null, isFilterTag: boolean) => {
  const isActive = activeTag === tag
  const style = isActive ? styles.tagActive : isFilterTag ? styles.tag : styles.cardTag
  return h(
    "span",
    {
      style: styleToString(style),
      ...(isFilterTag
        ? { "p-trigger": `filter-tag:click`, "data-tag": isActive ? "" : tag }
        : {}),
    },
    tag,
  )
}

const renderProjectCard = (project: Project, activeTag: string | null) =>
  h(
    "article",
    {
      style: styleToString(styles.card),
      "p-trigger": "select-project:click",
      "data-project-id": project.id,
    },
    h("img", {
      src: project.thumbnail,
      alt: project.title,
      style: styleToString(styles.cardThumbnail),
      loading: "lazy",
    }),
    h(
      "div",
      { style: styleToString(styles.cardBody) },
      h("h3", { style: styleToString(styles.cardTitle) }, project.title),
      h("p", { style: styleToString(styles.cardDescription) }, project.description),
      h(
        "div",
        { style: styleToString(styles.cardTags) },
        ...project.tags.map((tag) => renderTag(tag, activeTag, false)),
      ),
      h(
        "div",
        { style: styleToString(styles.cardLinks) },
        ...(project.demoUrl
          ? [
              h(
                "a",
                {
                  href: project.demoUrl,
                  style: styleToString(styles.cardLink),
                  target: "_blank",
                  rel: "noopener noreferrer",
                  onclick: "event.stopPropagation()",
                },
                "Live Demo",
              ),
            ]
          : []),
        ...(project.sourceUrl
          ? [
              h(
                "a",
                {
                  href: project.sourceUrl,
                  style: styleToString(styles.cardLink),
                  target: "_blank",
                  rel: "noopener noreferrer",
                  onclick: "event.stopPropagation()",
                },
                "Source Code",
              ),
            ]
          : []),
      ),
      h(
        "div",
        { style: styleToString(styles.cardDate) },
        `Added ${new Date(project.dateAdded).toLocaleDateString("en-US", { year: "numeric", month: "short", day: "numeric" })}`,
      ),
    ),
  )

const renderCarousel = (images: string[], lightboxIndex: number) =>
  h(
    "div",
    {},
    h(
      "div",
      { style: styleToString(styles.carousel) },
      h("img", {
        src: images[lightboxIndex] ?? images[0],
        alt: `Image ${lightboxIndex + 1}`,
        style: styleToString(styles.carouselImage),
      }),
      ...(images.length > 1
        ? [
            h(
              "button",
              {
                style: styleToString({ ...styles.carouselButton, ...styles.carouselPrev }),
                "p-trigger": "lightbox-prev:click",
              },
              "\u2039",
            ),
            h(
              "button",
              {
                style: styleToString({ ...styles.carouselButton, ...styles.carouselNext }),
                "p-trigger": "lightbox-next:click",
              },
              "\u203A",
            ),
          ]
        : []),
    ),
    ...(images.length > 1
      ? [
          h(
            "div",
            { style: styleToString(styles.carouselDots) },
            ...images.map((_, i) =>
              h("button", {
                style: styleToString(
                  i === lightboxIndex ? styles.carouselDotActive : styles.carouselDot,
                ),
                "p-trigger": "lightbox-goto:click",
                "data-index": String(i),
              }),
            ),
          ),
        ]
      : []),
  )

const renderDetailView = (project: Project, lightboxIndex: number) =>
  h(
    "div",
    { style: styleToString(styles.overlay), "p-trigger": "close-detail:click" },
    h(
      "div",
      {
        style: styleToString(styles.detailPanel),
        onclick: "event.stopPropagation()",
      },
      h(
        "button",
        { style: styleToString(styles.detailClose), "p-trigger": "close-detail:click" },
        "\u00D7",
      ),
      renderCarousel(project.images, lightboxIndex),
      h(
        "div",
        { style: styleToString(styles.detailBody) },
        h("h2", { style: styleToString(styles.detailTitle) }, project.title),
        h(
          "p",
          { style: styleToString(styles.detailDescription) },
          project.fullDescription,
        ),
        h(
          "div",
          { style: styleToString(styles.detailTags) },
          ...project.tags.map((tag) => renderTag(tag, null, false)),
        ),
        h(
          "div",
          { style: styleToString(styles.detailLinks) },
          ...(project.demoUrl
            ? [
                h(
                  "a",
                  {
                    href: project.demoUrl,
                    style: styleToString(styles.detailLink),
                    target: "_blank",
                    rel: "noopener noreferrer",
                  },
                  "View Live Demo",
                ),
              ]
            : []),
          ...(project.sourceUrl
            ? [
                h(
                  "a",
                  {
                    href: project.sourceUrl,
                    style: styleToString(styles.detailLinkSecondary),
                    target: "_blank",
                    rel: "noopener noreferrer",
                  },
                  "View Source Code",
                ),
              ]
            : []),
        ),
        h(
          "div",
          { style: styleToString(styles.detailDate) },
          `Added ${new Date(project.dateAdded).toLocaleDateString("en-US", { year: "numeric", month: "long", day: "numeric" })}`,
        ),
      ),
    ),
  )

const renderSortOption = (value: SortOption, label: string) =>
  h("option", { value }, label)

export const renderGallery = (
  state: GalleryState,
  filteredProjects: Project[],
  allTags: string[],
): ReturnType<typeof h> =>
  h(
    "div",
    { style: styleToString(styles.container), "p-target": "gallery-root" },
    h(
      "header",
      { style: styleToString(styles.header) },
      h("h1", { style: styleToString(styles.title) }, "Portfolio"),
      h(
        "div",
        { style: styleToString(styles.controls) },
        h("input", {
          type: "text",
          placeholder: "Search projects\u2026",
          value: state.searchQuery,
          style: styleToString(styles.searchInput),
          "p-trigger": "search:input",
        }),
        h(
          "select",
          {
            style: styleToString(styles.sortSelect),
            "p-trigger": "sort:change",
          },
          renderSortOption("date-desc", "Newest First"),
          renderSortOption("date-asc", "Oldest First"),
          renderSortOption("alpha-asc", "A \u2192 Z"),
          renderSortOption("alpha-desc", "Z \u2192 A"),
        ),
      ),
      ...(allTags.length > 0
        ? [
            h(
              "div",
              { style: styleToString(styles.tagBar) },
              ...allTags.map((tag) => renderTag(tag, state.activeTag, true)),
            ),
          ]
        : []),
    ),
    ...(filteredProjects.length > 0
      ? [
          h(
            "div",
            { style: styleToString(styles.grid) },
            ...filteredProjects.map((p) => renderProjectCard(p, state.activeTag)),
          ),
        ]
      : [
          h(
            "div",
            { style: styleToString(styles.emptyState) },
            "No projects match your search.",
          ),
        ]),
    ...(state.selectedProjectId
      ? (() => {
          const selected = state.projects.find((p) => p.id === state.selectedProjectId)
          return selected ? [renderDetailView(selected, state.lightboxIndex)] : []
        })()
      : []),
  )

trajectory.content:
The portfolio gallery module is ready. Here's what was created:

**Files:**
- `package.json` — Module manifest with MSS tags (`art`, `collection`, `sort`/`filter`, `none`, scale 2)
- `skills/portfolio-gallery/SKILL.md` — Seed skill describing capabilities
- `types.ts` — Type definitions for `Project`, `GalleryState`, `GalleryAction`, `SortOption`
- `data.ts` — Data layer using `Bun.file`/`Bun.write` for CRUD + filtering/sorting/tag extraction
- `styles.ts` — Complete style objects for grid, cards, detail overlay, carousel, and controls
- `render.ts` — UI rendering with plaited `h()` — responsive card grid, tag filter bar, search, sort dropdown, detail view with lightbox carousel
- `handlers.ts` — State reducer handling all actions (search, filter, sort, select, lightbox navigation, add/remove)
- `index.ts` — Bun server with HTML page route, `/action` endpoint for UI interactions, and REST API (`/api/projects`, `/api/tags`)
- `data/projects.json` — 5 seed projects with full metadata

**Features:**
- Responsive CSS Grid layout (`auto-fill, minmax(300px, 1fr)`)
- Search by title with real-time filtering
- Tag-based filtering (click to toggle)
- Sort by date (newest/oldest) or alphabetically (A-Z/Z-A)
- Detail overlay with image carousel (prev/next buttons, dot indicators)
- Links to live demo and source code on both card and detail views
- Client-side event delegation for `p-trigger` attributes with server-side re-rendering
